items.title: Dropbox founder Drew Houston steps down as CEO after 19 years as the company he built gets squeezed by Google and Apple
items.summary: Drew Houston, the co-founder who built Dropbox from a Y Combinator demo into a company with more than 700 million registered users, is stepping down as chief executive. items.title: Stiglo upozorenje: Svaki router može biti uređaj za nadzor
items.summary: Beamforming omogućuje routerima učinkovitije usmjeravanje signala prema povezanim uređajima. Kako bi to funkcioniralo, uređaji spojeni na mrežu šalju povratne informacije routeru, ali bez zaštite.

items.title: American Airlines is getting Starlink Wi-Fi
items.summary: American Airlines is planning to install SpaceX's Starlink Wi-Fi in hundreds of its airplanes, the airline announced today. items.summary: Save your money, your privacy, and the planet. This installable AI offers several benefits you won't find with more traditional models like ChatGPT.

items.title: This startup is betting India’s gig economy can train the world’s robots
items.summary: Human Archive, a startup founded by Berkeley and Stanford researchers, is paying gig workers in India to wear camera-equipped caps and sensor devices to collect the real-world physical training data that AI and robotics labs are racing to acquire.

items.title: Ferrari stock drops 7% after Luce EV reveal as investors question design and strategy
items.summary: Ferrari shares fell as much as 7 per cent in Milan trading on Monday, dropping to €290.55 and wiping roughly £3 billion from the company’s market cap.
